Question:
We will plan to perform a weighted Cox regression for NHANES data from 2005-2018.
Participants will be excluded if have missing data on any of the following: fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L) or glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) or months follow up examination or mortality status or age at screening was less than 20 years old.
They will also be excluded if they don't have diabetes or prediabetes when they are defined as the following:
diabetes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%)>=6.5 or fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dl, doctor told you have diabetes yes or taking inculin now yes.
prediabtes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%) >=5.7 less or equal to 6.4 fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl or yes to do you have prediabetes.
Main predictor is SHR - which is fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)/ (1.59* glycohemoglobin (%)-2.59), categorized as quartiles, categorized in quartiles(%) Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75.
The analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model and covariates will include age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin.
The main outcome is all-cause mortality with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- diabetes defined as meeting any of these:
  glycohemoglobin (%)>=6.5 or
  fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dl or
  doctor told you have diabetes yes or
  taking inculin now yes
- prediabtes defined as meeting any of these:
  glycohemoglobin (%) >=5.7 less or equal to 6.4 or
  fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl or
  yes to do you have prediabetes

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- missing months follow up examination
- missing mortality status
- age at screening < 20 years old

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin

Predictor:
- SHR calculated as:
  fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)/ (1.59* glycohemoglobin (%)-2.59)
  categorized in quartiles(%):
  Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75

Outcome:
- months followup examination
- all-cause mortality

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_d
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_e
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_h
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_i
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_j
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;

SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_j;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_glycohemoglobin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_taking_insulin_now
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."glycohemoglobin",
    t1."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t2."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t3."taking_insulin_now",
    t4."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes",
    t5."months_followup_examination",
    t6."mortality_status",
    t7."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t8."gender",
    t9."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Identify patients with diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetes AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
   OR "fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126
   OR "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
   OR "taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.2: Identify patients with prediabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_prediabetes AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE ("glycohemoglobin" >= 5.7 AND "glycohemoglobin" <= 6.4)
   OR ("fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 100 AND "fasting_glucose_mg_dl" <= 125)
   OR "ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.3: Include patients with either diabetes or prediabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_diabetes
UNION
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_prediabetes;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing fasting plasma glucose
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing mortality status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with age at screening < 20 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 SHR calculation
-- First, convert fasting glucose from mg/dl to mmol/l (divide by 18)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_raw AS
SELECT 
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    (f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" / 18.0) / (1.59 * f."glycohemoglobin" - 2.59) AS "shr_value"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Calculate quartile cutoffs for SHR
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_cutoffs AS
SELECT
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q1,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q3
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- Assign SHR quartile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr AS
SELECT 
    "respondent_sequence_number",
    CASE
        WHEN "shr_value" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25'
        WHEN "shr_value" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25 and <=50'
        WHEN "shr_value" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50 and <=75'
        ELSE 'Q4: >75'
    END AS "shr"
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- 4.5 Months follow-up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 All-cause mortality
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."mortality_status" AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT 
    c."respondent_sequence_number",
    a."age_at_screening",
    g."gender",
    r."race_hispanic_origin",
    s."shr",
    m."months_followup_examination",
    acm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_shr s ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination m ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = m."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality acm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = acm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."shr",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
